title: Buttery Ethiopian Wheat Stir-Fry
description: A silky and buttery post-workout dish featuring ethiopian wheat with dried cranberries and toast for a raw-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup olive oil or vegan butter substitute
1 can (14 oz) chickpeas, drained and rinsed
ingredients.notes: Drained and rinsed to remove excess salt

instructions: Heat oil or butter substitute in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onions and garlic, cooking until soft and translucent.
Stir in cranberries and chickpeas, tossing to coat evenly with spices.
Gradually stir in soaked wheat while continuously stirring to prevent burning.
Cook for about 10 minutes or until the wheat is golden brown and crisp on top.
Remove from heat, add lemon juice and parsley, toss gently to combine.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
